name: agent_capability_tool_to_api_schema_entry_visible_terminal
prompt: Verify the OpenHarness toolToAPISchema naming entry.
prompt_lines: Please verify the OpenHarness tool schema naming entry. Use only the read tool if you need to inspect source files. Do not modify files. Check learning_agent/tools/types.py and learning_agent/tools/pool.py. Your final answer must clearly state that toolToAPISchema exists, that available_tool_schemas uses toolToAPISchema, and that the first-turn tool surface remains read/write/edit/bash/tool_search. The final line must be exactly TOOL_TO_API_SCHEMA_ENTRY_OK.
